## What This PR Does
<!-- Brief description -->

## Checklist
- [ ] SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter (`name`, `description`, `license`, `metadata`)
- [ ] `name` in frontmatter matches directory name exactly
- [ ] SKILL.md is under 500 lines
- [ ] `description` is specific enough for agent discovery (no overlap with other skills)
- [ ] All referenced files exist (references/, tools/)
- [ ] Cross-references to related skills are included
- [ ] Code examples are original and production-quality
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials in content
- [ ] `skills_index.json` updated (if adding a skill)
- [ ] `VERSIONS.md` updated
- [ ] Tested with at least one agent (Claude Code, Codex, or Cursor)
